_description: A developer productivity tracker that aggregates GitHub, Jira, and Slack activity into a daily pulse.
idea_normalised: A developer productivity analytics platform that aggregates activity from GitHub, Jira, Linear, and Slack to give teams a daily engineering health pulse.

brand_config.logo_concept: A pulse/heartbeat line with code brackets
brand_config.target_audience: Engineering managers and CTOs at 10-200 person tech companies

features: GitHub PR cycle time and merge rate tracking
Jira/Linear sprint velocity and completion metrics
DORA metrics dashboard (deployment frequency, lead time, MTTR, CFR)
Slack bot for daily standup digest

problem: Engineering managers have no unified view of team health
Productivity data is scattered across 5+ tools
DORA metrics require expensive consultants to set up
lean_canvas_json.solution: A single engineering health dashboard that auto-aggregates from all your tools
lean_canvas_json.unique_value_proposition: DORA metrics + team morale + bottlenecks — in one 5-minute daily read
lean_canvas_json.unfair_advantage: Pre-built integrations for the top 6 dev tools — zero setup time

personas.name: Ravi
pain_points: Manually pulling data from 5 tools every Monday
Hard to justify headcount to leadership
